creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 173182
svn diff #3

Changes since last diff:

- add readline to USES=
- change the BLAS group of options from OPTIONS_RADIO to OPTIONS_SINGLE
- explicitly disable BLAS-shlib when the internal BLAS is not chosen (can cause a problem when building outside of poudriere)
- remove a misplaced trailing '\'

portlint: same two warnings as above
testport: OK (poudriere: 9.3-RELEASE-p44, i386,  default options)
testport: OK (poudriere: 9.3-RELEASE-p44, amd64, default options)
testport: OK (poudriere: 10.3-RELEASE-p5, i386,  default options)
testport: OK (poudriere: 10.3-RELEASE-p5, amd64, default options)
